summary: Iteration 21: Tested Villa Paris v2.0.0 features - Meteo API, Frequent Visitors quick-fill, Piano B dual layout, Imperial Tables, and version bump. Found and fixed 1 bug: field name mismatch between frontend/backend for disposizioneSalePianoB vs disposizioneSalaPianoB. All 13 backend tests passed, all frontend features verified via Playwright.
seed_data_creation: Created test presenze with meteo field for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All v2.0.0 features tested and working. Fixed field name mismatch bug (disposizioneSalePianoB -> disposizioneSalaPianoB). Meteo API uses Open-Meteo integration. Imperial tables render as rectangular shapes with forma='imperiale'. Piano B allows dual layout management.

meteo_api.details: GET /api/meteo returns weather data with date, weatherCode, descrizione, tempMax, tempMin, meteoString

meteo_worker_access.details: Worker role can access /api/meteo endpoint (added to middleware allowed paths)

suggerimenti_api.details: GET /api/presenze-villa/suggerimenti returns frequent visitors with nome, cognome, azienda, count

presenze_meteo_field.details: POST /api/presenze-villa saves meteo field correctly, GET returns meteo in items

rapportini_meteo_widget.details: Rapportini page shows meteo widget with weather data (e.g., 'Pioggia leggera, 7.2°/13.9°C')

rapportini_quick_fill.details: Visitatori frequenti button opens suggestion panel, clicking suggestion auto-fills nome, cognome, azienda

presenze_table_meteo_column.details: Presenze table shows Meteo column with weather data

piano_ab_toggle.details: Piantina page has Piano A/Piano B toggle switch, Piano B shows separate layout

piano_b_save.details: Saving piantina saves both Piano A and Piano B configurations (disposizioneSalaPianoB field)

imperial_table_button.details: Piantina page has '+ Imperiale' button to add imperial table

imperial_table_render.details: Imperial table renders as rectangular (not circle) with forma='imperiale'

imperial_table_seats_variants.details: Imperial table supports seats (posti) and menu variants like regular tables

disposizione_field_name_mismatch.description: Field name mismatch between frontend and backend for Piano B disposition
disposizione_field_name_mismatch.root_cause: Frontend sent 'disposizioneSalePianoB' but schema has 'disposizioneSalaPianoB' (without 's' in 'Sale')
fix_applied: Fixed /app/src/app/api/eventi/route.ts line 291: changed updateData.disposizioneSalePianoB to updateData.disposizioneSalaPianoB
Fixed /app/src/app/(app)/piantina-evento/[id]/page.tsx line 93: changed data.disposizioneSalePianoB to data.disposizioneSalaPianoB
